title: Badouzi Fishing Port
summary: The Badouzi Fishing Port (traditional Chinese: 八斗子漁港; simplified Chinese: 八斗子渔港; pinyin: Bādǒuzi Yúgǎng) is a fish harbor in Zhongzheng District, Keelung, Taiwan.
text:
The Badouzi Fishing Port (traditional Chinese: 八斗子漁港; simplified Chinese: 八斗子渔港; pinyin: Bādǒuzi Yúgǎng) is a fish harbor in Zhongzheng District, Keelung, Taiwan.

History
The fish harbor was established in 1975. Recently, the harbor has been developed into a modern recreational fish harbor.

Destinations
The harbor serves as the departure point for Keelung Islet.

Transportation
The fish harbor is accessible within walking distance north west of Haikeguan Station of Taiwan Railway.
